description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of light-colored stone or concrete and large glass windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and includes a driveway with two parked cars, a small front lawn, and a backyard with outdoor seating and a gazebo. Several trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the house, enhancing its curb appeal and providing privacy. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and smaller rectangular ones. The main entryway is recessed, covered by a dark overhang, and accessed via a short walkway from the driveway.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a mix of stone and concrete exterior, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entryway with a dark overhang, and a small front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with outdoor seating, gazebo, and several trees along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large windows, and a wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage area, side lawn, and additional trees near the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and smaller rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a dark overhang, short walkway, and no porch or columns
